targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    COALESCE(c.campprototypeid, 'no prototype') as prototype,
    date(day) as count,
    date(day) as time
FROM generate_series($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), '1d'::interval) day
         LEFT JOIN period p on daterange(date(p.start), date(p."end"), '[]') @> date(day)
         LEFT JOIN camp c on p.campid = c.id;

select count(1)
from camp c
where c.isprototype = false
and c.id in  (
  select p.campid
  from  period p
  where p.end >  TO_DATE('20250601','YYYYMMDD')
  and   p.start <  TO_DATE('20250831','YYYYMMDD')
)

select count(1)
from camp c
where c.isprototype = false
and exists (
  select 1
  from period p
  where p.campid = c.id
  and p.start <= now() 
  and p.end > now()
)

select count(1)
from camp c
where c.isprototype = false
and c.id in  (
  select p.campid
  from  period p
  where p.end >  TO_DATE('20240601','YYYYMMDD')
  and   p.start <  TO_DATE('20240831','YYYYMMDD')
)

select date_trunc('day', c.createtime), count(1) 
from camp c
where c.isprototype=false AND $__timeFilter(c.createtime)	
group by date_trunc('day', c.createtime)
order by date_trunc('day', c.createtime)

SELECT
  CASE
    campPrototypeId
    WHEN '75b3572a338e' THEN 'J+S DE'
    WHEN 'f92fe1cd1ae9' THEN 'Basic'
    WHEN '497f974e7d5d' THEN 'J+S FR'
    WHEN 'dffcb39cb4fb' THEN 'J+S Kurs DE'
    WHEN 'fc8417239f9a' THEN 'J+S Kurs FR'
    ELSE 'No Prototype'
  END,
  COUNT(*)
FROM
  camp
GROUP BY
  campPrototypeId
ORDER BY
  CASE
    campPrototypeId
    WHEN 'f92fe1cd1ae9' THEN 0
    WHEN '75b3572a338e' THEN 1
    WHEN '497f974e7d5d' THEN 2
    WHEN 'dffcb39cb4fb' THEN 3
    WHEN 'fc8417239f9a' THEN 4
    ELSE 99
  END

select count(1) as "Zukünftige"
from camp c
where c.isprototype = false
  and exists (select 1
              from period p
              where p.campid = c.id
                and (p.start > now()))
SELECT COUNT(id) AS "Total" FROM camp WHERE isprototype = false LIMIT 50

select count(1) as "Vergangen"
from camp c
where c.isprototype = false
and not exists (
  select 1 
  from  period p 
  where p.campid = c.id
  and   p.end > now()
)

select date_trunc('day', u.createtime), count(1) 
from "user"  u
group by date_trunc('day', u.createtime)
order by date_trunc('day', u.createtime)

(select 'Google' name, count(1) from profile p where p.googleId is not null) union
(select 'PBS' name, count(1) from profile p where p.pbsmidataId is not null) union
(select 'Cevi' name, count(1) from profile p where p.cevidbId is not null) union
(select 'Jubla' name, count(1) from profile p where p.jubladbId is not null) union
(select 'eCamp' name, count(1) from profile p where p.googleId is null and p.pbsmidataId is null and p.cevidbId is null and p.jubladbId is null)

select INITCAP(u.state), count(1)
from "user" u
group by u.state  
union
select 'Total', count(1)
from "user"
order by 1

select DATE_TRUNC('month', createtime) as createtime,
       sum(case when name = 'Google' then count else 0 end) as "Google",
       sum(case when name = 'PBS' then count else 0 end) as "PBS",
       sum(case when name = 'Cevi' then count else 0 end) as "Cevi",
       sum(case when name = 'Jubla' then count else 0 end) as "Jubla",
       sum(case when name = 'eCamp' then count else 0 end) as "eCamp"
from (
  select 'Google' as name, DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as createtime, count(1) as count
  from profile 
  where googleId is not null
  group by DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime)

  union all

  select 'PBS' as name, DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as createtime, count(1) as count
  from profile 
  where pbsmidataId is not null
  group by DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime)

  union all

  select 'Cevi' as name, DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as createtime, count(1) as count
  from profile 
  where cevidbId is not null
  group by DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime)

  union all

  select 'Jubla' as name, DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as createtime, count(1) as count
  from profile 
  where jubladbId is not null
  group by DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime)

  union all

  select 'eCamp' as name, DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as createtime, count(1) as count
  from profile 
  where googleId is null 
    and pbsmidataId is null 
    and cevidbId is null 
    and jubladbId is null
  group by DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime)
) as subquery
WHERE createtime > TIMESTAMP '2023-02-01 00:00:00'
group by DATE_TRUNC('month', createtime)

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS profiles, 
    COALESCE(language, 'auto') AS language 
FROM 
    profile 
GROUP BY 
    COALESCE(language, 'auto') 
ORDER BY 
    language DESC;

select INITCAP(u.state), count(1)
from "user" u
where $__timeFilter(u.createtime) 
group by u.state
union
select 'Total', count(1)
from "user" u
where $__timeFilter(u.createtime) 
order by 1

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN duration <= 15 THEN duration + 1
        ELSE 17
        END AS duration_category,
    count(*) AS count
FROM (
         SELECT
             "end" - start AS duration
         FROM
             period
     ) AS subquery
GROUP BY
    duration_category
ORDER BY
    duration_category;
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', createtime) as time, COUNT(*) as "Day" FROM camp_collaboration GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', createtime) as time, COUNT(*) as "Week" FROM camp_collaboration GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;

SELECT sum(case when campPrototypeId is null          then 1 else 0 end) "no prototype",
       sum(case when campPrototypeId = 'f92fe1cd1ae9' then 1 else 0 end) "Basic",
       sum(case when campPrototypeId = '75b3572a338e' then 1 else 0 end) "J+S Lager DE",
       sum(case when campPrototypeId = '497f974e7d5d' then 1 else 0 end) "J+S Lager FR",
       sum(case when campPrototypeId = 'dffcb39cb4fb' then 1 else 0 end) "J+S Kurs DE",
       sum(case when campPrototypeId = 'fc8417239f9a' then 1 else 0 end) "J+S Kurs FR",
       DATE_TRUNC('week', createtime) as                                  time
FROM camp c
GROUP BY time;

SELECT ct.name, count(content_node.id) as count FROM content_node LEFT JOIN content_type ct on ct.id = content_node.contenttypeid WHERE $__timeFilter(content_node.createtime) GROUP BY ct.name ORDER BY count DESC ;

SELECT
    date_trunc('day', c.createtime) as "created",
    date_trunc('day', p.start) as "period start",
    date(p.start) - date(c.createtime) + 1 AS "created before period start",
    date(now()) - date(p.start) as startcolor
FROM
    period p
LEFT JOIN camp c ON c.id = p.campId
WHERE
    date(p.start) - date(c.createtime) > -1 AND
    $__timeFilter(c.createtime);

SELECT content_node.instancename AS "×", count(content_node.id) as count
FROM content_node
WHERE $__timeFilter(content_node.createtime) AND instancename is NOT NULL
GROUP BY content_node.instancename
ORDER BY count DESC;
